description_long: This is a small, cylindrical plastic bottle with a bright red screw cap and a clear body, partially filled with a light beige powder. The bottle's body is transparent, allowing the contents to be seen, and it features a label with colored text and graphics, though the details are partially obscured or faded. The cap has a textured grip and a visible seam, suggesting it can be twisted open. The bottle appears to be a common spice or seasoning container, likely used for culinary purposes. The label wraps around the lower half of the bottle, with some text and branding visible in blue and white. The overall condition of the bottle is clean, with no visible damage or deformation.
description: A small, clear plastic bottle with a red screw cap, partially filled with beige powder and featuring a wrapped label. The bottle is clean and intact, with visible branding and a textured cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red cap, clear body, and partial label with some text visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bottle's cylindrical shape and the seam on the red cap.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with more of the label visible, showing blue and white text.
description_view_3: Rear view with the label mostly obscured and the cap's texture visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Label with blue and white text, some yellow and red elements, partially visible on the lower half of the bottle.
